name: Beginner Friendly
description: Suitable for most beginners with basic instruction.

name: Home Friendly
description: Can be performed in most home training environments.

name: Unilateral
description: Loads one side of the body at a time.

name: Compound
description: Uses multiple joints and major muscle groups.

name: Isolation
description: Emphasizes one primary joint or muscle group.

name: Warmup
description: Useful in warmup or preparation blocks.

name: Low Impact
description: Lower joint impact than jumping or running alternatives.
